name: stw-collection-book
description: Tracker for the Fortnite: Save the World Collection Book — data pipeline + interactive web app.

scripts.dev: npm run data:build && npm run web:dev
scripts.build: npm run data:build && npm run web:build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace data && npm run typecheck --workspace web
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
